overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The character walks along a sidewalk beneath yellow pedestrian overpasses, past towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and neon storefront signs on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under yellow overpass

events.description: walking under the yellow pedestrian overpass, entering covered area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching and entering the covered area beneath the yellow pedestrian overpass

notable_agents.action: woman in purple top walking ahead on the sidewalk
white van driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: bright yellow elevated pedestrian walkway spanning across the street
orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
large illuminated advertisements on the building facades
tall futuristic glass and steel towers rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city intersection and progresses under a bright yellow pedestrian overpass. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers, with digital billboards visible on the left building facades. A woman in purple walks ahead while vehicles pass on the multi-lane street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with tree planters and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into direct sunlight
passing large concrete planters with trees lining the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past tree planters and commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the tree planters

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters containing mature trees with green foliage
green neon sign reading BRISTON on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal tree-lined sidewalks with large concrete planters. The yellow overpass recedes into the background on the left as the camera passes commercial buildings. A person sits on a bench near the trees while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with neon signage

events.description: passing the BRISTON and CHROME neon signs on the right side buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past various commercial buildings with glowing neon signs and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person standing near the building entrance looking at their phone

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical building with horizontal louvers and a circular upper structure
red neon sign reading CHROME on the dark building facade

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the commercial corridor with the BRISTON neon sign becoming prominent on the right. The tree planters fall behind as a distinctive circular futuristic building comes into view ahead. Various pedestrians are seen browsing or standing near storefronts while traffic barriers recede into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon approaching futuristic circular building

events.description: floating vehicle advertisement becomes visible suspended between buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching the circular building structure with more pedestrians visible on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking toward the camera
group of people standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: futuristic car displayed on a hovering circular platform suspended between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the distinctive circular building with a floating vehicle advertisement hovering overhead. The street becomes more crowded with pedestrians, including a person in white walking toward the camera. The orange traffic barriers have fallen completely out of view as the urban canyon narrows with tall buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a futuristic commercial district that transitions from a sheltered intersection into a wide, sun-drenched urban corridor. It begins beneath a bright yellow pedestrian overpass, moving along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers and digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the shade into bright sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal tree-lined sidewalks with large concrete planters while the overpass recedes into the background. The walk then continues past commercial storefronts, where a prominent BRISTON neon sign appears on the right before a distinctive circular futuristic building comes into view ahead. Finally, the camera approaches this circular structure as a floating vehicle advertisement hovers overhead and the urban canyon narrows, with the orange barriers disappearing completely amidst a growing crowd of pedestrians.
